svg.aria-label: Incremental engine for long-horizon agents — Data transformation for any engineer, designed for AI workloads, with a smart incremental engine for always-fresh, explainable data. Python-native transformation flows connect 8 source categories (codebases, meeting notes, web APIs, file system and blob stores, databases, message queues, images and video, voice and transcripts) through a shared pipeline (FileLike → split() → chunks → embed(chunk) → vec) out to 6 target stores (relational DB, data warehouse, vector DB, graph DB, message queue, feature store). Only the Δ is reprocessed — unchanged inputs hit the cache, changed inputs re-run split() and re-embed. CocoInsight gives live lineage (src → sink) and observability over the whole pipeline. The persistent data-pipeline control plane runs eight always-on subsystems: live caching (reuse what hasn't changed — only the delta runs), pipeline catalog (every flow registered — find, fork, reuse), version tracking (code, schema, data — all versioned end-to-end), continuously learning (the engine adapts as your data and code evolve), lineage (every byte in the target traces back to a source), task scheduling (parallel by default — low-latency, low-cost), metrics collection (throughput, freshness, cost — all observable), and failure management (retries, back-off, dead letters — no data loss). Keywords: data pipeline, ETL, source connectors, vector database, graph database, incremental engine, streaming ingestion, caching, lineage, versioning, scheduling, metrics, retries, CocoInsight, observability, Python, React for data engineering.
svg.title: Incremental engine for long-horizon agents — CocoIndex control plane
svg.desc: One wide illustration. Top: title + tagline + Learn-the-concept pill. Middle pipeline: SOURCES column on the left (8 coloured category chips) converging through the Python-native transformation in the centre (code block lifted by the coco mascot, with cache-hit / split-re-runs / Δ-re-embed annotations and a CocoInsight lineage pill) and diverging to TARGETS column on the right (6 coloured store chips). Bottom: 'Persistent Data Pipeline · Control Plane' section with 8 subsystem tiles in a 4×2 grid, each in a distinct brand colour.
svg.text: Python-native flows · eight subsystems, always-on, auditable · only the Δ is reprocessed.
